text.title: Stakeholder Register Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping register state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all stakeholder IDs unique and match S-NNN format?

branch.when: ids_valid == true AND attitude_in_enum == true AND evidence_present == false
ids_valid == true AND attitude_in_enum == true AND evidence_present == true AND strategy_valid == false
ids_valid == true AND attitude_in_enum == true AND evidence_present == true AND strategy_valid == true AND stale_count > 0
ids_valid == true AND attitude_in_enum == true AND evidence_present == true AND strategy_valid == true AND stale_count == 0

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: ids_valid=true, attitude_in_enum=true, evidence_present=true, strategy_valid=true, stale_count=0 → accept register.
